## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss performance updates, content production, and blog refresh progress.](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog/per diem pages stable; expense category pages declining (\~30% loss over 2 months)](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Vendor pages saw significant session/view increases](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Content production deadline extended to Friday; publishing automation in development](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Blog refresh articles need tone adjustment and improved formatting](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)

## Topics

### Performance Updates

  - [Blog pages: Rebounded in sessions/views, stabilizing after recent decline](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Per diem pages: Holding steady, minor position changes](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Expense category pages:](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [Continued decline (\~30% session loss over 2 months)](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Difficulty pinpointing exact pages causing loss](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - [AI overview effect still primary theory for decline](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Minor loss (\~10 sessions), not alarming](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Stable](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Significant increase in sessions/views across all pages](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Production and Publishing

  - [Deadline for page creation extended to Friday](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Publishing 37 pages by next Friday (not Wednesday as initially requested)](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Automation development starting next week to increase publishing capacity](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [Manual publishing currently a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
      - [Automation expected to significantly scale output in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [QA process for automated publishing:](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [Both human and automated checks planned](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Weekly reports to provide visibility on potential issues](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

### Blog Refresh Articles

  - [Addressed Matt's comments on initial batch](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Retired one article due to content overlap](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Working on H3 updates for Friday delivery](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Tone adjustment needed:](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Current drafts too conversational/"hokey" for Ramp's voice](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Need to find balance between brand guidelines and appropriate tone](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Formatting improvements required:](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [Break up "walls of text" with lists, tables, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [Enhance readability, especially on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver created pages by Friday for review](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Continue current publishing volume for next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Dev team to focus on designing publishing automation starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Address tone and formatting issues in upcoming blog refresh articles](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide updates on vendor page automation progress](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Implement QA process and reporting for automated publishing when ready](https://fathom.video/share/1iiP42M3MHBoBxn_o7-b96iANZVSFsyW?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
